stemHtml: Which one of the following statements concerning drift-down is correct?

options.a: The drift-down procedure requires a minimum descent angle after an engine failure at cruising altitude.
options.b: When determining the obstacle clearance during drift-down, fuel dumping may be taken into account.
options.c: The drift-down procedure requires a minimum obstacle clearance of 35 ft.
options.d: An engine failure at high cruising altitude will always result in a drift-down, because it is not permitted to fly the same altitude with one engine inoperative as with all engines operating.
